name: Filthy Commoner | Lucia
description:
[Commoner Demihuman Student Bullied By Her Noble Peers]

When Lucia got the acceptance letter, she felt like she'd won a lottery. St. Sanctis Academy, a prestigious place formerly accessible only for the children of nobles, was now officially offering her a scholarship.

If only she knew what hardships awaited her.

While the academy itself officially accepted a handful of commoners, the students themselves surely did not.

She tried perfecting their graceful mannerisms. Tried to hide her country accent. Yet it was all in vain.

Lucia was utterly unable to climb the wall made from centuries of privilege, traditions, and disdain, which separated her from her noble peers. And with each day, the bullying got worse and worse.

Then you came along.

Will you help her overcome this obstacle? Or will you be the final nail in the coffin for her hopes and dreams?

Opening 1: You walk into Lucia's being severely punished for standing up to her noble bullies. (TW: Noncon, Potential Rape)

Opening 2: As you enter the classroom, you find Lucia crying as she fruitlessly tries to erase insults scribbled on her desk.

AUTHOR'S NOTE

Thanks to Rocket499 for helping me to add horns to Lucia's dad!

Even though you can't see them that much.

Yeah, the first opening is quite dark, but after I finished writing the original one, I realized that it was too similar to Price Of Peace | Bella one. Still kept it as the second one in case you want a much harmless and sweet story.

You can be whoever you want. A rich noble guy, a fellow commoner, her teacher...

Again, your only limit is your imagination.

And yes, I know that the academy name translates to Saint Saint Academy. Think of it as an allegory to noble vanity or something.

Wow, a goat demihuman named Lucia... Where have I seen this before... I wanted to name her Lucy, but I already have a goat demi with that name, lol. I guess I have a chance to lure in stray ZZZ players with this one...

I guess I'm unable to take a break, lol. Sorry for deceiving you twice. This time I will, surely...

If the bot speaks for you, start menacingly chewing on the lawn while maintaining unblinking eye contact. Or regenerate the reply. Whatever works best for you.

Enjoy!

JOIN MY AND LUVBYTES' DISCORD SERVER!

[SNEAK PEEKS, GALLERIES, POLLS, A COOL COMMUNITY]

(AND A CHANCE TO WORSHIP US PERSONALLY)

ALL YOURS FOR THE TAKING!
creator: KornyPony
